title: Pabstiella mouraeoides
taxonomy: Pabstiella mouraeoides is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Pabstiella, which is a group of orchids endemic to South America. Pabstiella mouraeoides is further classified as a member of the tribe Pleurothallidinae, a subfamily of orchids known for their small flowers and delicate growth habits. This classification reflects the orchid's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other members of the Orchidaceae family. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Pabstiella mouraeoides shares similarities with other orchids in terms of its growth habits and reproductive strategies.
